---
title: "Features"
sidebar: en
---

Table focuses on what you need on the move: view data, find it, change it precisely.

## Modules

| Area | What it does |
|------|--------------|
| **Base list** | Every base the token can reach. |
| **Table list** | Tables in a base with column and row counts. |
| **Rows view** | Rows in a table, filtered by view; infinite scroll. |
| **Detail view** | Every field of a row in column order. |
| **Edit** | Change individual cells (text, number, select, date) and save. |

## Auth model

| Token | Lifetime | Where it lives |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| **API token**  | long-lived (user/workspace-bound) | platform secure store |
| **Base token** | short-lived (issued by SeaTable) | memory only; auto-refreshed |

When the base token expires, the app silently requests a new one — no re-authentication.

## Workflows

| Goal | In the app |
|------|------------|
| Look up a phone number fast | Base → "Contacts" table → filter bar → keyword → detail. |
| Update a status field | Open table → row → status field → new choice → save. |
| Capture a field note | Table → row → note field → type → save. |

## Network profile

| Connection | Target |
|------------|--------|
| HTTPS requests | only to the configured SeaTable URL. |
| Auth | API / base token in the `Authorization` header. |
| Other hosts | not contacted. |

## Where to get it

| Channel | App |
|---------|-----|
| App Store (iOS) · Google Play (Android) | Etabli Table |
| F-Droid — main repository | Etabli Table |
| Source code | [`etabli-dev/etabli-table`](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-table) |
